zh.Graz, Styria, Holy Roman Empire: 奧地利斯泰爾馬可弗朗岑斯大學
zh.lifeSummary: 當Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria於1176年10月15日出生在奧地利維恩時，他的父親Leopold V. Herzog von Österreich28歲，母親Helena Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő19歲。他於1203年與Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1230年7月28日享年53歲。

zh-hans.Graz, Styria, Holy Roman Empire: 奥地利斯泰爾馬可弗朗岑斯大學
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria于1176年10月15日出生在奥地利維恩时，他的父亲Leopold V. Herzog von Österreich28岁，母亲Helena Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő19岁。他于1203年与Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1230年7月28日享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Austria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Virgilio, Ramon, Roberto, Alfredo, Eduardo, Jaime, Jesus, Almario, Amado, Anastacio, Angelito, Arsenio.
Hispanic (mainly Philippines): from the name of the European country, either as an ethnic name or with a reference to the Austrian Habsburg dynasty which ruled Spain in the 16th and 17th centuries.
Possibly also an Americanized form of German Österreich ‘Austria’.

nameMeanings.name: Leopold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from liut ‘people’ + bold ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered by association with Latin leo ‘lion’. A name of this origin may have been introduced into Britain by the Normans, but if so it did not survive long. It was reintroduced to Britain from the Continent towards the end of the 19th‐century in honour of Leopold , King of the Belgians ( 1790–1865 ) and uncle of Queen Victoria , to whom he was an influential adviser in her youth: she named one of her sons after him.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria was born on 15 October 1176, in Vienna, Austria, his father, Leopold V. Herzog von Österreich, was 28 and his mother, Helena Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, was 19. He married Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi in 1203. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 28 July 1230, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria est né le 15 octobre 1176, à Vienne, Autriche, son père, Leopold V. Herzog von Österreich, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Helena Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi en 1203. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 28 juillet 1230, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria am 15. Oktober 1176 in Wien, Österreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Leopold V. Herzog von Österreich 28 und seine Mutter Helena Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő 19. Er hat 1203 Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Juli 1230 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria è nato il il 15 ottobre 1176 nel Wien, Austria, il suo padre, Leopold V. Herzog von Österreich, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Helena Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi nel 1203. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 28 luglio 1230, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styriaが1176年10月15日にオーストリアウィンで生まれた時，父Leopold V. Herzog von Österreichは28歳，母Helena Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnőは19歳であった。1203年にTheodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-háziと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1230年7月28日に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria(이)가 1176년 10월 15일 오스트리아 빈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Leopold V. Herzog von Österreich(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Helena Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1203년 Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1230년 7월 28일 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria nasceu em 15 de outubro de 1176, em Wien, Áustria, seu pai, Leopold V. Herzog von Österreich, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Helena Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi em 1203. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de julho de 1230, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria родился 15 октября 1176 г. в местности Вена, Австрия, его отцу по имени Leopold V. Herzog von Österreich было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Helena Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi в 1203 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 28 июля 1230 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

es.15.10.1176–28 July 1230: 15 de octubre de 1176–28 de julio de 1230
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria nació el 15 de octubre de 1176, en Wien, Austria, su papá, Leopold V. Herzog von Österreich, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Helena Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi en 1203. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 28 de julio de 1230, a la edad de 53 años.
